meta.title: Bitrefill
meta.description: Purchase gift cards, eSIMs, and mobile top-ups from 170+ countries. Search products, create invoices, pay with crypto, and retrieve redemption codes.

searchProducts.name: searchProducts
searchProducts.description: Search the Bitrefill product catalog for gift cards, eSIMs, and mobile top-ups

getProductDetails.name: getProductDetails
getProductDetails.description: Get denomination options and full details for a specific product

createInvoice.name: createInvoice
createInvoice.description: Create an invoice to purchase products. Supports auto-pay or crypto payment.

getInvoice.name: getInvoice
getInvoice.description: Get invoice status and payment details

getOrder.name: getOrder
getOrder.description: Get order details including redemption codes

listOrders.name: listOrders
listOrders.description: List recent orders with optional date filtering

checkPhoneNumber.name: checkPhoneNumber
checkPhoneNumber.description: Validate phone number and find compatible top-up operators

purchaseESIM.name: purchaseESIM
purchaseESIM.description: Purchase a new eSIM or top-up an existing one

createDeposit.name: createDeposit
createDeposit.description: Create a crypto deposit to fund account balance (Business API only)
